stack.title: Tech Stack
stack.subtitle: Nirvana's tech stack organized in architectural layers. Click on any technology to explore my real use cases and code examples.

openai.narrative: Integrating OpenAI API for state-of-the-art generative AI capabilities. Implemented in multiple projects like Bridge for LSP-to-text translation and conversational chat systems. I use GPT-4 Turbo for complex natural language understanding and generation tasks, leveraging function calling and streaming capabilities.

watsonx.narrative: IBM Watsonx platform for enterprise AI at scale. Designed for complex scenarios requiring on-premise deployment, governance, and regulatory compliance. Experience in integrating IBM Granite models and implementing business-focused RAG solutions with strict control over data and models.

ollama.narrative: Ollama to run LLMs locally during development and testing. Essential for fast iteration without cloud API costs. I use Llama 3, Mistral, and Code Llama for prototyping, offline development, and experimentation with different prompt engineering strategies before cloud deployment.

langchain.narrative: Implementing LangChain to orchestrate advanced AI agents and RAG systems. Used in Bridge to coordinate language models with vector databases, enabling contextual responses and conversation memory. Facilitates complex chains that combine information retrieval, natural language processing, and response generation.

huggingface.narrative: Utilizing Hugging Face to access pre-trained ML models and fine-tune transformers. Essential platform for experimentation with open-source models, text embeddings, and custom model deployment. Implemented in NLP pipelines for classification, sentiment analysis, and information extraction.

react.narrative: React as the foundation for building composable and reactive user interfaces. Mastery of hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo) for state management and side effects. I implement patterns like compound components, render props, and custom hooks to create reusable and maintainable code. Experience with Context API and state management libraries.

nextjs.narrative: Next.js 15 with App Router is my main framework for modern web applications. I leverage Server Components to optimize initial load, Server Actions for mutations without API endpoints, and file-based routing system. I implement SSR, ISR, and SSG based on each project's needs, achieving ultra-fast experiences with optimized SEO.

typescript.narrative: TypeScript as the primary language for frontend and backend development, ensuring type safety and better developer experience. I use advanced types (generics, conditional types, mapped types), robust interfaces, and strict mode to prevent bugs during development. I implement type guards, utility types, and custom types for type-safe APIs.

javascript.narrative: JavaScript ES6+ as the foundation of modern web development. Deep knowledge of functional programming, closures, promises, async/await, and the event loop. Experience with DOM manipulation, Web APIs, and performance optimization. Essential for both client-side and server-side development with Node.js.

nodejs.narrative: Node.js as the runtime for JavaScript backend, enabling full-stack development with a single language. Experience with event loop, streams, and performance optimization. I implement scalable architectures with clustering, efficient async I/O handling, and leverage the rich npm ecosystem.

nestjs.narrative: NestJS for scalable and maintainable backend architectures with TypeScript. I leverage its module system, dependency injection, and decorators to build enterprise-grade applications. I implement guards for authentication, interceptors for logging, pipes for validation, and filters for error handling. Ideal for microservices and GraphQL APIs.

fastapi.narrative: FastAPI for building high-performance APIs with Python. Ideal framework for ML/AI projects thanks to its excellent integration with the Python ecosystem. I implement async endpoints for maximum concurrency, automatic validation with Pydantic, auto-generated documentation with OpenAPI, and dependency injection for clean and testable code.

flask.narrative: Flask as a micro-framework for Python, ideal for small applications and ML APIs. Highly flexible with minimalist architecture that allows complete control over components. Experience in building custom extensions, integrating with Scikit-learn/PyTorch, and deploying lightweight services in containers.

python.narrative: Python as the primary language for Machine Learning, Data Science, and backend APIs. Deep experience with the scientific ecosystem (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn) and deep learning frameworks. Clean code following PEP 8, type hints for better maintainability, and async/await for concurrent operations.

django.narrative: Django as a batteries-included full-stack framework for robust and secure web applications. Experience with ORM, admin panel, authentication system, and middleware. I implement REST APIs with Django REST Framework, integrate Celery for async tasks, and leverage its excellent ecosystem for rapid full-stack development.

springboot.narrative: Spring Boot for enterprise applications with Java. Production-ready framework with embedded server, auto-configuration, and comprehensive ecosystem. Experience in implementing microservices with Spring Cloud, security with Spring Security, data access with Spring Data JPA, and deploying on cloud-native architectures.

express.narrative: Express.js as a minimalist framework for Node.js, perfect for flexible and lightweight APIs. Mastery of middleware for authentication, logging, error handling, and validation. I implement RESTful and GraphQL APIs, integrate with multiple databases, and deploy scalable microservices with Express.

postgresql.narrative: PostgreSQL as the primary relational database for production applications. Expertise in complex schema design, optimized indexes, advanced queries with CTEs and window functions. I implement extensions like PostGIS for geospatial data in Rentstate, json/jsonb for semi-structured data, and full-text search. Proficient in performance tuning and backup strategies.

mongodb.narrative: MongoDB for flexible NoSQL databases with document-based schema. Ideal for rapid prototyping and applications with evolving data models. Experience with aggregation pipelines, indexing strategies, replica sets, and horizontal scaling with sharding. Used in projects requiring flexible schemas and high write throughput.

prisma.narrative: Prisma as a modern ORM for TypeScript, offering complete type-safety from database to application. I use Prisma Client for type-safe queries, Prisma Migrate for schema version control, and Prisma Studio for visual administration. I implement complex relations, cascades, and optimizations with strategic select/include.

chromadb.narrative: ChromaDB as a vector database for RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems and semantic search. Implemented in Bridge to store LSP document embeddings and perform ultra-fast similarity searches. Enables combining long-term memory with generative AI capabilities, fundamental for contextual conversational agents.

redis.narrative: Redis for high-performance caching, user sessions, and real-time pub/sub. I implement cache-aside, write-through strategies, and rate limiting. Used to reduce latency in frequent queries, store session tokens, and as a message broker for event-driven architectures.

gcp.narrative: Google Cloud Platform for production-grade infrastructure. Experience with Cloud Run for serverless containers, Cloud SQL for managed databases, Cloud Storage for static assets, and Cloud Build for CI/CD. I implement scalable architectures with load balancing, auto-scaling, and monitoring with Cloud Logging and Monitoring.

azure.narrative: Microsoft Azure for enterprise cloud solutions. Experience with Azure Functions for serverless, Azure SQL Database, Azure DevOps for CI/CD, and Azure Active Directory for identity management. I implement hybrid architectures, integrate with Microsoft ecosystem, and leverage Azure Cognitive Services for AI capabilities.

git.narrative: Git as the version control system for collaboration and source code management. Mastery of advanced workflows with feature branches, rebasing, cherry-picking, and conflict resolution. I implement conventional commits, pre-commit hooks with Husky and lint-staged, and branching strategies like Git Flow or trunk-based development.

githubActions.narrative: GitHub Actions for automated CI/CD and custom workflows. I create pipelines that run tests, linting, build, and automatic deployment on every push. I implement matrix builds for cross-platform testing, dependency caching for speed, and secure secrets management. Integration with Vercel, GCP, and other cloud services.

docker.narrative: Docker for containerization and consistency between development and production environments. I create optimized Dockerfiles with multi-stage builds to reduce image size. I implement docker-compose for local microservice orchestration, network and volume configuration. CI/CD integrated with automated build and cloud deployment.

vercel.narrative: Vercel as the deployment platform for Next.js applications with zero-config. I leverage edge functions for minimal global latency, preview deployments for each PR, and integrated analytics. Custom domain configuration, environment variables per environment, and instant rollbacks. Ideal for modern frontend with exceptional DX.

jest.narrative: Jest as the primary testing framework for JavaScript and TypeScript. Zero-config experience with integrated mocking, code coverage, and snapshot testing. I implement unit tests for components and utilities, integration tests for APIs, and use custom matchers for domain-specific assertions.

pytest.narrative: PyTest for Python testing with clean and expressive syntax. Mastery of fixtures for test setup, parametrization for multiple scenarios, and plugins like pytest-asyncio for async code. I implement comprehensive test suites with clear arrange-act-assert structure and achieve high code coverage for backend services.

cypress.narrative: Cypress for end-to-end testing of web applications with exceptional developer experience. Real browser automation with time-travel debugging, automatic waiting, and network stubbing. I implement critical user flow tests, visual regression tests, and integrate into CI/CD pipelines for continuous quality assurance.
